name: Chill Train - Densha no kuni
short_description: Become the driver of a regional train on the fictional "Shuppatsu-eki - Densha Terminal" line. Chill Train - Densha No Kuni is a small arcade/simulation train game with simple controls, putting you in the role of a driver on a short urban line.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the regional line "Shuppatsu-eki - Densha Terminal"!

Chill Train - Densha No Kuni is a small arcade/simulation train game with simple controls that puts you in the role of a driver on a fictional line.

Each journey is evaluated, and achieving an "S" rank on every route will require great precision and focus.

Serve the various stops at the scheduled times and handle the many events that arise during the journey, such as speed restrictions, level crossings, or unexpected maintenance work, and more.

20 base routes await to test your driving skills, with varying numbers of stops and different weather conditions.

But with a bit of perseverance, you might unlock the brand-new high-speed "Inazuma" train and its dedicated routes!

See you soon on the "Shuppatsu-eki > Densha Terminal" line!
